response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot proficiency, and experience with Docker/Kubernetes. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit cloud-provider depth, but the foundation is strong enough to warrant an interview.
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent/MCP tooling matching the primary stack
13+ years of full-stack delivery across web, mobile, and embedded with demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, PHP) and infrastructure experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and GitLab CI
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is part of the primary stack
Kotlin is not listed in skills or work history despite being a secondary requirement
Limited explicit cloud-platform depth beyond AWS CDK at one role; no GCP/Azure or Vitest/Playwright mention

key_factors.factor: Primary stack match (TS/Node/React) + AI agent/MCP experience
Long track record of full-stack delivery and engineering craftsmanship
